name: Create Geometry Exit Ticket Flipchart
description: Create a 5-page formative assessment 'Exit Ticket' flipchart for Ms. Rivera's 4th grade geometry lesson on angles. The flipchart must include a title page with "Geometry Exit Ticket: Types of Angles" and "Ms. Rivera", followed by individual pages for an acute angle labeled "Acute", a right angle labeled "Right", and an obtuse angle labeled "Obtuse". The final page should be a self-assessment titled "How did you do?" featuring three colored circles (green, yellow, red) labeled "Got it", "Almost", and "Help". Save the completed file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/geometry_exit_ticket.flipchart.
